args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, AVG(CAST(DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) - DATE(o.CreatedDate) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON c.Id = o.ContractID__c
WHERE DATE(o.CreatedDate) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= DATE(o.CreatedDate)
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId, AVG(CAST(DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) - DATE(o.CreatedDate) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON c.Id = o.ContractID__c
WHERE DATE(o.CreatedDate) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) >= DATE(o.CreatedDate)
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
